prediction.chief_complaint: follow-up for hypothyroidism with elevated TSH

medications.name: levothyroxine
medications.frequency: once daily on empty stomach with water only, 30 to 60 minutes before food, coffee, or other medications

diagnoses.description: hypothyroidism, TSH elevated on current levothyroxine dose

plan: increase levothyroxine to 88 mcg once daily
take levothyroxine on empty stomach with water only, 30 to 60 minutes before food, coffee, or other medications
call if palpitations, jitteriness, or trouble sleeping develop

follow_up.reason: TSH recheck after levothyroxine dose increase
